response:
Subject: Follow-up on Technical Support Inquiry  

Dear Mr. Ivan Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response. I hope this message finds you well.  

Regarding the current machine vision system, I would like to clarify that the device in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C. Based on the technical data attached to this email, the image sensor used is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor.  

I have attached the relevant technical documentation for your reference. Please find:  
- The FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file  
- The FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file (page 13)  

I will review these documents in detail and provide you with further insights and any additional information needed.  

Thank you again for your support and assistance.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Organization]
